query:
SELECT 
  ticker,
  signal,
  units,
  ROUND(entry_price, 4) as entry_price,
  ROUND(current_price, 4) as current_price,
  ROUND(current_sl, 4) as stop_loss,
  ROUND(current_tp, 4) as take_profit,
  ROUND(unrealized_pnl, 2) as open_pnl,
  ROUND(unrealized_pnl_pct, 2) as open_pnl_pct,
  ROUND(ziv_score, 1) as ziv_entry,
  ROUND(ziv_h_score, 1) as ziv_h_now,
  ROUND(allocated_capital, 0) as allocated,
  opened_at,
  updated_at
FROM paper_positions
WHERE status = 'open'
ORDER BY unrealized_pnl DESC;
